content: Which of the following has maximum iron content?
explanation:
The percentage of other elements in iron are as follows:

(a) Cast iron $$=$$ about $$2.1 \%$$

(b) Wrought iron $$=$$ about $$0.08 \%$$

(c) Pig iron $$=$$ about $$4 \%$$

(d) Stainless steel = about $$1.7 \%$$

On the basis of above information wrought iron has maximum iron content.

Hence, option (b) is the correct.
